summary: Update the README to document the new API key setup flow. Pure prose change — no code, no tests. The phrase 'API key' is incidental; the docs describe setup rather than implement auth.

blast_radius.why: README is adjacent to the product; nothing executes from it.

compliance_scope.why: Docs describe existing flow; no regulated data surface is introduced.

user_facing_impact.why: Docs support users but are not the product itself.

coordination_cost.why: Technical writer + one reviewer for accuracy.

specialists.name: technical-writer
specialists.why: Owns the README and the setup-flow prose.

phases.name: build
phases.why: The edit itself is the 'build' — write the updated setup section.

phases.name: review
phases.why: Single-pass accuracy check against the actual setup flow.

rigor_why: All factors LOW; docs-only update with no executable surface; advisory review is enough.
complexity_why: One file, prose update, no dependencies.

tasks.title: Update README with new API key setup section
Review README for accuracy against actual setup flow
